title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Accor India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Accor India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Accor India in Meerut is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Accor India:
Accor India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accor India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
